3.1.0.27:
Qutepart installation fails to find PyQt5
if run as `python#VER# setup.py install`.
Evidently, setuptools doesn't support installing from wheel.
Therefore, only invoke this as:

Unix:
 python#VER# -m pip install -e .

Windows:
 python#VER# setup.py build_ext --include-dir=../pcre-8.37/build --lib-dir=../pcre-8.37/build/Release
 python#VER# -m pip install -e .

3.2.0.27:
Qutepart requires PyQt5. Install it with your package manager.
On Debian and Debian based
	apt-get install python#VER#pyqt5
On Fedora
	dnf install python#VER#qt5
